title: Hyko
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Hyko''''' was a group of two [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

The unit was part of a larger convoy carrying officers, supplies and troopers, that gathered near [[Orron III]] en route to the soon to be finished [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star I]]. The convoy was due to rendezvous with the [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] [[Toral (BFF-1 bulk freighter)|''Toral'']] which was [[Rescue of enslaved Wookiees|attacked]] on the way by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces. Learning of the rendezvous location from the ''Toral'', the Rebels dispatched [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red]] and [[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold]] squadrons, along with a [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] from [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron]] to [[Battle of Orron III|destroy]] the convoy.

Despite heavy resistance from the escorting [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]], ''Hyko'' group, along with the rest of the convoy, was destroyed by the Rebel ships.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]
